这个组的内容可以替换上面的Flux Inpaint组，详见教程

## 简介/Introduction
本工作流默认使用Flux inpainting方式，模型使用较多，有Flux dev模型，IC-Light FC模型、SD1.5真实风格大模型，如果使用中缺少模型，可以检查下对应的位置。
This workflow defaults to using Flux inpainting. There are many models used, including Flux dev model, IC Light FC model, and SD1.5 real style large model. If the model is missing during use, you can check the corresponding position.

## 使用建议/Tips
1. 输入的商品图片的质量很重要，因为需要从它同步细节
   The quality of the input product image is important because it needs to synchronize details from it
2. 不同商品可能需要应用不同的抠图方案，可以多试几种
   Different products may require different cutout schemes, so you can try several more 
3. 打光时，简单的光照图效果也不错
   When lighting, simple lighting patterns also have good effects
4. 采样时可以添加ControlNet和IPAdapter以达到更稳定的控制效果
   During sampling, ControlNet and IPAdapter can be added to achieve more stable control effects
